## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] perf (performance)
- [ ] test (test-related)
- [ ] docs/chore

## Scope
- [ ] player
- [ ] enemy
- [ ] combat
- [ ] ui
- [ ] audio
- [ ] vfx
- [ ] build/infra

## Linked Issues
- Closes #
- Related #

## Implementation Notes
- Key design/technical decisions:
- Risks or tradeoffs:

## Test Plan
- [ ] Run in Unity Play Mode
- [ ] No Console Error
- [ ] Basic combat loop works (attack/hit/parry if affected)
- [ ] Repro steps documented below

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `develop`
- [ ] Commit messages follow convention
- [ ] PR is focused and reviewable
- [ ] No unrelated file changes included
